sections.paragraph:
σπέρμα, ατος, τό [σπείρω]

—1. ‘source of propagation’, seed

—a. of seed of plants Mt 13:24, 27; Mk 4:31; 1 Cor 15:38; 2 Cor 9:10 v.l.

—b. of seed/semen of humans Hb 11:18.

—2. ‘product of propagation’

—a. of ancestral continuity or lineage seed, posterity Mt 22:24f; Mk 12:19-22; Lk 1:55; J 7:42; 8:33, 37; Ac 3:25; 13:23; Ro 1:3; 2 Cor 11:22; 2 Ti 2:8. By metonymy and in imagery, of Abraham’s extended believing community Ro 4:16; 9:8; Gal 3:29.

—b. w. focus on a specific descendant seed, descendant Gal 3:16.

—c. w. focus on production of divine characteristics through God’s own seed 1 J 3:9.
